scripts.release:check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && rm -rf .release-pack && mkdir -p .release-pack && pnpm --filter ./core/protocol pack --pack-destination .release-pack && pnpm --filter ./core/runtime pack --pack-destination .release-pack && pnpm --filter ./cli pack --pack-destination .release-pack && pnpm --filter ./mcp-server pack --pack-destination .release-pack && pnpm --filter ./relay pack --pack-destination .release-pack
